Visit to Our University from Alexandru Ioan Cuza University

As part of the international collaborations we have developed through the Erasmus program,

, Assistant Professor at Alexandru Ioan Cuza University in Romania, visited our Psychology (English) Department and delivered lectures to our students.

We sincerely thank her for sharing her valuable knowledge on the topics of Post-traumatic Stress Disorder and Eating Disorders with our students.

DİĞER HABERLER

PROSPECTIVE STUDENT

STUDENT
